obligations.franchisee_must: Locate and propose Site within 90 days of signing FA
Purchase approved equipment, develop to specs, sign Option to Assume Lease with landlord
Complete Sonic Training Program (Principal + 2), GM Leadership Class, pay travel/living
Pay royalty 5%, SBF 0.90%, cooperative/SMF 3.25-5%, Inspire Payment Services $365-$565/mo
obligations.franchisor_controls: Fee rates, market classification, incentive eligibility

obligations.franchisee_must: Comply with Ops Manual (733 pages), maintain standards, participate in mandatory programs
obligations.franchisor_controls: Standards, specifications, supplier approval, menu items, pricing policies

obligations.franchisee_must: Submit Gross Sales reports, maintain daily records, provide development cost reports within 120 days
obligations.franchisor_controls: Report formats, unlimited POS data access

obligations.franchisee_must: Acquire and maintain required insurance, name franchisor as additional insured
Obtain approval, meet all conditions, pay transfer fee, sign release
obligations.franchisor_controls: All transfer approval, ROFR, option to purchase

obligations.franchisee_must: No competing business during term; 18 months post-term within 3 miles

item10_financing.summary: No direct or indirect financing. No guarantees.

obligations.when: 60 days before opening or 6 months after hire
Upon opening; new hires within 120 days

restrictions: Cannot deviate from Sonic Plans and Specifications without prior written approval
Cannot develop social media presence without authorization

obligations: Must operate from approved Site only
Must relocate within Protected Area if lease expires or restaurant destroyed
Must pay all relocation costs and de-identify old site
restrictions: Cannot use internet, catalog, telemarketing, or direct marketing for sales
No right to acquire additional franchises in Protected Area or contiguous areas
Protected Area may shrink based on census data
rights: May solicit/accept orders from customers outside Protected Area
Protected Area exclusion (subject to carve-outs) for new Sonic restaurants
triggers: Population census update → may reduce Protected Area

obligations: Use Proprietary Marks only as periodically designated and authorized
Identify as independent owner with any use of marks
Notify franchisor of any infringement or challenge
Sign documents for trademark protection proceedings
Comply with substitute marks at franchisee expense
restrictions: Marks only for restaurant operation, not other business
No right under DA to use marks (only under FA)

obligations: Notify franchisor of infringement/challenges
Disclose all Innovations promptly
All Innovations are work-for-hire belonging to franchisor
Sign assignment documents as requested
May not use any Innovation without prior approval
restrictions: Cannot use any Innovation in operations without approval
Must modify or discontinue using patents/copyrights as directed

obligations: Principal must personally participate and devote best efforts
At least one trained individual working full-time at all times
All Management Personnel must have ServSafe within 120 days
10%+ owners must sign Personal Guaranty
NDA clauses required for employees/owners with Confidential Information access
Serve all required menu items
Display and offer only approved menu
Comply with pricing policies (max, min, or other) to maximum extent law allows
Participate in mandatory promotions, loyalty programs, gift card programs
restrictions: No items not listed in Ops Manual or not otherwise approved
Franchisor has unlimited right to change authorized products/services
